  Closed out the autopilot/beta-deploy roadmap loose ends. (1) Re-saved dapp_beta custom domain to re-trigger HTTPS cert provisioning (prod HTTPS already fine; beta still provisioning async). (2) Repointed local ~/Applications/dapp clone to dapp_beta (the base where work happens). (3) Refreshed the roadmap tracker (agentic_ai_context#226): B4-B6 shipped+deployed, /ship gate enabled. (4) Live end-to-end smoke test of the /ship gate via dapp_beta#1: verified check_ci_green reads real CI and ship_pr correctly REFUSES on red CI (the B5 safety works live). Surfaced a follow-up: dapp_beta CI fails a Playwright expense-form test (unit tests pass), so the green-CI gate is blocked until the suite is green — fix/stabilize that test (or split CI so the gate requires unit tests only) before relying on /ship or enabling BETA_AUTO_MERGE.
